'''Turpimir''' was the fourth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] orbiting the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Hoth's Brand]] in the [[Ruusan system/Legends|Ruusan system]]. Located in the [[Teraab sector/Legends|Teraab sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], it was a barren world.

It was named after the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Turpimir]].

During [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]]'s [[Search for the Valley of the Jedi|Quest for the Valley of the Jedi]] on [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]] and his invasion of the planet, most ships of his [[Vengeance_Battle_Group|''Vengeance'' Battle Group]] were still centered around the fourth planet of the system.<ref name="Dark Forces: Jedi Knight">''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''</ref>
{{Planet-stub}}
